title: Starrett A4 Hole Saws Arbor - 14-30mm Hex Shank Arbor Screw Thread with 6.35mm High-Speed Steel Pilot Drill - Quick Change Mandrel
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: HOLE SAW ARBOR: Durable, heavy-duty, and carbon steel arbor that comes complete with pilot drills. Adapt Starrett Hole Saw arbor to any power drill used by professionals.
SIMPLE TO USE: Simply screw the threaded bit into the hole saw and attach the hex shank to the drill.
RELIABLE: This drill arbor is safe and reliable to use. It can hold the hole saw securely to ensure it stays in place and does not slip during drilling
DURABLE: Made of a high-quality steel body for maximum durability. The superior hardness design allows this arbor to be usable for a long time
PERFECT SIZE: Fitted with a 6.35mm (1/4″) high-speed steel pilot drill and fits 6.5mm (1/4”) chuck size, Shank size; 6.5mm (1/4″) Hex., Screw thread; 1/2″ (20mm)
EASY TO CARRY: The compact size allows you to take your arbor anywhere to do any job. It can easily fit in any tool bag
COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with holesaws of a minimum of 14 mm (9/16""), up to 30 (1.3/16""). This hole saw arbor is suitable to use with Starrett Fast Cut (FCH), Carbide Tipped (CT), Diamond Cut.
description: From the manufacturer PRECISION, QUALITY, INNOVATION Starrett was founded in 1880 by Laroy Sunderland Starrett, believing that “I could do no greater good than help creates a business that would give people employment and a chance to earn an honest living.” Back then it started with just one product; the Combination Square. Now we are recognized as the “ World’s Greatest Toolmakers". Our ranges include: Holesaws & Accessories Bandsaw Blades Jigsaw Blades Reciprocating Blades Starrett Hole Saws Arbor Standard Starrett hole saw arbor is made of a steel body for maximum durability and efficient drilling. The superior hardness design allows this arbor to be used for a long time. It contains a pilot drill measuring 6.35mm (1/4′′) to ensure accurate alignment. This arbor is safe and reliable to use. Its 6.5mm (1/4”) hex arbor shank allows for a secure and stable connection during drilling operations. 79mm length ensuring longevity and excellent performance. Design for efficient drilling High-speed steel pilot drill The arbor chuck measures 6.5mm (1/4”) Includes with 6.35mm (1/4″) pilot drill Hex arbor shank allows for a stable connection Screw thread ensures a robust fastening mechanism Steel body material ensures the strength of the arbor SPECIFICATIONS Holesaw Pairing Fast cut hole saw (FCH), Carbide Tipped (CT) Fits Holesaw Diameter 14-30mm (9/16”-1.3/16”) Arbor Shank Size 6.5mm (1/4”) hex Screw Thread ½”-20 UNF Chuck Size 6.5mm (1/4”) Drill Type HSS Drill Length 79mm (3.1/8”) Colour Black and Grey Body Material Steel
